Id1.text: Alliant Techsystems makes the ALV X-1 and also produces the AgM-88 HARM.

Id2.text: AGM-88 HARM is produced by Alliant Techsystems which is the manufacturer of the ALV X-1.

Id3.text: The ALV X-1 and the AgM-88 HARM were manufactured by Alliant Techsystems.

gold_outputs: AGM-88 HARM is produced by Alliant Techsystems which is the manufacturer of the ALV X-1.
Alliant Techsystems makes the ALV X-1 and also produces the AgM-88 HARM.
The ALV X-1 and the AgM-88 HARM were manufactured by Alliant Techsystems.
